mano_cua.result_summary: 在 About 页面找到6个带有 data-url 属性的链接按钮。点击测试后，5个按钮（Website、See the code、Privacy Policy、Terms of service、Code of conduct）的实际导航目标与其 data-url 属性值不符，全部错误地跳转到 https://github.com/mistweaverco/bananas/issues/new（Report a bug 的URL）。只有 Report a bug 按钮导航正确。点击处理器未正确使用各按钮的 data-url 属性值来决定跳转目标。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: I can now clearly read the comprehensive test results. The console output shows: 1. Button: 'Website' | data-url: https://getbananas.net | actual: https://github.com/mistweaverco/bananas/issues/new | match: false ❌ 2. Button: 'Report a bug' | data-url: https://github.com/mistweaverco/bananas/issues/new | actual: https://github.com/mistweaverco/bananas/issues/new | match: true ✅ 3. Button: 'See the code' | data-url: https://github.com/mistweaverco/bananas | actual: https://github.com/mistweaverco/bananas/issues/new | match: false ❌ 4. Button: 'Privacy Policy' | data-url: https://github.com/mistweaverco/bananas/PRIVACY.md | actual: https://github.com/mistweaverco/bananas/issues/new | match: false ❌ 5. Button: 'Terms of service' | data-url: https://github.com/mistweaverco/bananas/TOS.md | actual: https://github.com/mistweaverco/bananas/issues/new | match: false ❌ 6. Button: 'Code of conduct' | data-url: https://github.com/mistweaverco/bananas/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md | actual: https://github.com/mistweaverco/bananas/issues/new | match: false ❌. Summary: 5 out of 6 buttons navigate to the wrong URL. Critical bug confirmed.
